{{CargoClone
|name=Saintess of Earth
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=187
|gene1={race} RUSH +50
|gene2={race} FTH +50
|gene3=Each round, {race} RUSH +30
|gene4=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +6
|gene5=Angel Minion Recovery SPD +1.5%
|gene6=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +10
|gene7=Angel Minion Recovery SPD +2.5%
|}}
